title: geum hispidum
intro: Geum hispidum, also known as hispid avens or prickly avens, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Geum hispidum has been used to treat a variety of health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and sore throats, thanks to its expectorant and diuretic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies and traditional medicine.
